---
title: ""
---


Please select the provider you would like to consult with. You will be directed to their calendar to choose an available time slot.

---

<div class="card">

## Dr. Sajana Aryal

For speech, language, hearing, tinnitus, and communication-related consultation.

<a href="https://calendar.app.google/6cVyaYHpytMepqPP8" target="_blank" class="button">Book with Dr. Sajana Aryal</a>

</div>

---

<div class="card">

## Biraj Bhattarai

For speech, language, hearing, and neurological communication consultation.

<a href="https://calendar.app.google/jtq4Jkqq7qGCqcBJ7" class="button">Book with Biraj Bhattarai</a>

</div>

---

<div class="card">

## Dr. Pratik Bhandari

For speech, language, cognition, and communication-related consultation.

<a href="#" class="button">Book with Dr. Pratik Bhandari</a>

</div>

---

## BEFORE YOUR APPOINTMENT

Please prepare the following information:

- Main concern or reason for consultation  
- Any previous diagnosis or reports (if available)  
- Speech,Language and Hearing evaluation  test results (if available)  
- Questions/Conerns you would like to discuss/share  

---

## IMPORTANT INFORMATION!!

- Sessions are conducted online via Google Meet (Client need to have good internet access)
- You will receive a confirmation email after booking  
- A meeting link will be shared automatically
